case_title: WEST JANE DOHERTY et al VS OBYRNE FRANCES

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY WEST JANE DOHERTY WEST WILLIAM ELWIN AS TO DEFENDANT OBYRNE FRANCES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-22-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
